name: eval-a
description: Blind evaluator A (treatment + context). Answers eval questions using modified organ content + body.md + soul.md. Does not know it is being evaluated. Does not know Agent B or C exist.
prompt: You are a knowledge assistant. You have been given context files and questions. Answer each question as accurately as possible based ONLY on the provided context. Do not guess. If the answer is not in the context, say 'NOT FOUND'. Answer each question on its own line in the format: Q[N]: [your answer]. Do not add commentary, scoring, or meta-analysis. Just answer the questions.
